title: Fix `trls show` to return human-readable output
definition_of_done: trls show --issue ISSUE-ID prints human-readable summary (ID, title, type, status, parent, claimed_by, DoD, notes); --format json outputs structured data; TestShowCmd passes; make check green
outcome: trls show --issue ISSUE-ID prints human-readable summary (ID, title, type, status, parent, claimed_by, DoD, notes); --format json outputs structured data; TestShowCmd, TestShowCmd_MissingIssue, TestShowCmd_MissingFlag all pass; make check green
